callWithGET.signature: void callWithGET(String subURL, var parameters, var callback)
callWithGET.description: Calls a sub URL and executes the callback when finished.

callWithPOST.signature: void callWithPOST(String subURL, var parameters, var callback)
callWithPOST.description: Calls a sub URL with POST arguments and executes the callback when finished.

cleanFinishedDownloads.description: Removes all finished downloads from the list.

downloadFile.signature: var downloadFile(String subURL, var parameters, var targetFile, var callback)
downloadFile.description: Downloads a file to the given target and returns a Download object.

getPendingCalls.description: Returns a list of all pending Calls.

getPendingDownloads.description: Returns a list of all pending Downloads.

isEmailAddress.description: Checks if given email address is valid - not fool proof.

isOnline.description: Returns true if the system is connected to the internet.

resendLastCall.description: Resends the last call to the Server (eg. in case that there was no internet connection).

setBaseURL.description: Sets the base URL for all server queries.

setEnforceTrailingSlash.description: Sets whether to append a trailing slash to each POST call (default is true).

setHttpHeader.description: Adds the given String to the HTTP POST header.

setNumAllowedDownloads.description: Sets the maximal number of parallel downloads.

setServerCallback.description: This function will be called whenever there is server activity.

setTimeoutMessageString.description: Sets a string that is parsed as timeout message when the server doesn't respond. Default is "{}" (empty JSON object).
